untranslatable_reason: Signal specifies 'price > 20-day MA by at least 1%' which requires a derived percentage comparison not directly available as a single indicator. Also requires '2+ consecutive days confirmation' which needs bar-by-bar logic not expressible in single condition format.
translation_notes: Translated core momentum conditions using available indicators: minimum price floor, price above SMA_20 (momentum), and volume confirmation. Excluded the 1% threshold precision and multi-day confirmation requirement as they require sequential/derived logic beyond the scope of single-condition rules. Stop loss of 15% maps directly from parameters. Used vol_ratio_20 as proxy for volume above 20-day average.
